transcript:
Q1: Yatharth, Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients/customers did you work with and what services/activities did you perform?
A1: Yeah, that's hard. Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients, customers did you work with and what services, activities did you perform? Not officially. I have helped family here and there. Uh, but I'm a quick learner so I can figure it out on the spot.

Q2: Yatharth, Imagine you're finding a caregiver for a loved one. What traits or skills would be most important?
A2: Can you repeat your question?

Q3: Yatharth, Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients/customers did you work with and what services/activities did you perform?
A3: Not officially, but I have helped family here and there. I'm a quick learner so I can figure it out on the spot.

Q4: Yatharth, Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients/customers did you work with and what services/activities did you perform?
A4: Not officially, but I have helped family here and there. I'm a quick learner, so I can figure it out on the spot. And I've been working for a daycare for two years, uh, giving uh, handling, bathing, dressing, light meal prep, medication reminders, basic mobility support and uh also a little housekeeping.
